title: Bellingham, WA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bellingham, WA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bellingham is a city in WA with a population of 92,293. A coastal college town near Vancouver BC with outdoor access, craft breweries, and a growing tech scene.

Last updated: July 07, 2026
